Internal legal memorandum — Công ty Cổ phần Năng Lượng Aurora (Aurora Power JSC), Mã số thuế (MST) 9134780112, trụ sở: Tầng 10, Tòa Tháp Gió, 25 Đường Hoa Sen, Q7, TP. Nam Á.
Re: Proposed private placement on Sở Giao dịch Chứng khoán Bình Minh (BMX) and draft disclosure under hướng dẫn của Ủy ban Chứng khoán Bình Minh; strictly MNPI until public notice.
Deal terms (MNPI): draft price VND 21,800/share under internal code APVN2026, target raise VND 480,000,000,000; discount ~12% to the 29/06 closing level; expected allotment T+30 after BMX clearance.
Contact for execution: Ông Lê Hữu Khánh (Tổng Giám đốc), email: k.le@aurorapower.example, di động: +84 90 123 4765.
Employee due diligence (PII): Bà Trần Hồng Mai (Kế toán trưởng), CCCD 1530 9284 1275; Hộ chiếu P7774432; địa chỉ làm việc: T10, Tòa Tháp Gió; số TK lương tại NHTM Cát Trắng: 0423-888-777-6666; SWIFT: CATTRVVX.
Banking for proceeds: Tài khoản doanh nghiệp 0666 3141 2718 mở tại NHTM Cát Trắng – CN Hoa Sen; chủ tài khoản: CTCP Năng Lượng Aurora (nội bộ, không công bố).
Investor-relations public hotline 1900 000 111 is for general enquiries and is not personal contact information.
Note on placeholders: form field labels such as “Họ tên: __________” and “CCCD: __________” in templates are not actual data; sample CCCD 000000000000 is invalid and should be ignored.
Obfuscated scan artifacts in the draft show M S T: 9 1 3 4 7 8 0 1 1 2 and a d a t a r o o m link https://dataroom.example/file?id=APVN2026&m s t=9134%20780%20112.
Compliance: process personal data per Nghị định 13 (consent, purpose limitation, data subject rights); do not transmit staff phone numbers or passport numbers beyond the deal team; removal requests via privacy@aurorapower.example.
We do not collect device MAC addresses (e.g., 00:11:22:33:44:55) or geolocation in the investor portal; analytics are anonymized and aggregated.
Negative media regarding the “Aurora Home Charger” retail product (consumer line) does not relate to issuer disclosures and is outside this memo’s scope.
Draft disclosure checklist prepared; regulator liaison is a role-only placeholder in the tracker; “chuyên viên UBCK Bình Minh” appears only as a role and is not a named person.
All materials remain “project lotus” workspace content and must not be circulated externally until BMX notice is posted and UBCK Bình Minh acceptance is confirmed.
